allow: Bash(printf '\\n/* Settings dropdown in hero */\\n.settings-dropdown {\\n    position: relative;\\n}\\n.settings-dropdown summary {\\n    list-style: none;\\n    cursor: pointer;\\n}\\n.settings-dropdown summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }\\n.settings-content {\\n    position: absolute;\\n    right: 0;\\n    top: calc\(100%% + 0.5rem\);\\n    z-index: 10;\\n    padding: 0.65rem;\\n    display: grid;\\n    gap: 0.5rem;\\n    min-width: 160px;\\n    border-radius: var\(--radius-md\);\\n}\\n\\n/* Boost ad card */\\n.boost-ad-row {\\n    border-color: rgba\(103, 167, 255, 0.3\);\\n    background: linear-gradient\(180deg, rgba\(103, 167, 255, 0.1\), rgba\(255,255,255,0.03\)\);\\n    margin-bottom: 0.65rem;\\n}\\n.boost-ad-row .upgrade-row-icon {\\n    color: var\(--blue, #67a7ff\);\\n}\\n\\n/* Ad modal */\\n.ad-modal-card {\\n    border-color: rgba\(103, 167, 255, 0.24\);\\n}\\n.ad-placeholder {\\n    text-align: center;\\n    padding: 1.5rem;\\n    border-radius: var\(--radius-md\);\\n    background: rgba\(255,255,255,0.04\);\\n    border: 1px solid rgba\(255,255,255,0.07\);\\n}\\n.ad-fake-content {\\n    font-size: 1.1rem;\\n    font-weight: 700;\\n    color: var\(--muted\);\\n    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;\\n    letter-spacing: 0.08em;\\n}\\n')
